heading: General Agreement on Tariff and Trade un­affected
label: 1366 General Agreement on Tariff and Trade un­affected
text: The enactment of sections 1352(a), (c), 1354, and 1360 to 1367 of this title, and , shall not be construed to determine or indicate the approval or disapproval by the Congress of the Executive Agreement known as the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade.section 624(f) of title 7
notes: References in TextSections 1362 to 1365 of this title, included in the reference to sections 1360 to 1367 of this title, were repealed by , , ; was repealed by , , .Pub. L. 87–749, title II, § 257(e)(1)76 Stat. 882section 1367 of this titlePub. L. 87–456, title III, § 303(c)76 Stat. 78Oct. 11, 1962May 24, 1962
CodificationSection was not enacted as part of the Tariff Act of 1930 which comprises this chapter.

Prior ProvisionsSimilar provisions were contained in , , other sections of which amended and enacted ; and in , , which act amended , and sections 1330(d), 1352(c) and former , and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 1351 and 1364 of this title.act July 1, 1954, ch. 445, § 368 Stat. 360section 1352(c) of this titlesection 1352a of this titleact Aug. 7, 1953, ch. 348, title I, § 10367 Stat. 472section 624(b) of title 7section 1364(a) of this title

Congressional Approval or Disapproval of General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade, , , provided that:Pub. L. 85–686, § 1072 Stat. 680Aug. 20, 1958“The enactment of this Act [enacting , amending sections 1333, 1336, 1337, 1351, 1352a, 1360, and former , and enacting notes set out under sections 1352 and 1366 of this title] shall not be construed to determine or indicate the approval or disapproval by the Congress of the executive agreement known as the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade.”section 1335 of this titlesection 1364 of this title
